title: Puppets of Fate
writer: Ruth Ann Baldwin, Brian Oswald Donn-Byrne, Molly Parro
actors: Viola Dana, Francis McDonald, Jackie Saunders
plot: Gabriel Palombra, who operates a Punchinello street show in Venice, decides to fulfill his ambition of going to America. He leaves behind his wife, Sorrentina, promising to send for her. In the United States, disillusioned, he tak...
